name: ome-music-netease-runtime
description: Pinned manifest for the bundled NetEase Cloud Music API runtime used by the Ome Music Windows installer. Installed via `npm ci --omit=dev` from the committed package-lock.json. NOTE: this version mirrors the Ome Music app release that ships it (currently 0.3.7); it is bumped in lockstep with the app for traceability and does not track independent runtime changes.
